assessment_layer: AI pre-visit assessment with saved photos and floorplan; no in-person score yet

listing.build_age_read: Modern/newer-feeling compact double-storey home; photos show clean contemporary finishes

visual_assessment.newness_read: Newer/contemporary presentation, not an older renovated shell
visual_assessment.study_work_area: 3.7 x 2.9m retreat plus 2.0 x 3.0m study nook
visual_assessment.kitchen_storage: WIP plus island and visible cabinetry
visual_assessment.outdoor: 2.8 x 4.6m courtyard; low maintenance but coverage unverified
visual_assessment.orientation_read: North arrow indicates kitchen/living glazing faces mostly north, with some western exposure

contract.title: Lot 3 on Plan PS713558, Volume 11456 Folio 250
contract.covenant_content: Single dwelling only (no dual occupancy); external walls ≥75% brick/brick-veneer/timber/cement/glass; no second-hand materials visible from street. Imposed by Geelong Land Group when subdividing PS638299L in 2012. Binds all lots in that subdivision. Expires 2028.
contract.sale_type: Auction — no cooling-off, no finance/B&P condition at auction
contract.sc3b_address_note: Vendor discloses some Section 32 certificates reference wrong street address (administrative error by certificate supplier). Conveyancer must verify this is clerical only.
contract.water_asset: E-1 and E-2 pipeline easements in favour of Barwon Water Corporation (standard utility easements)
contract_watchpoints: Covenant expires 2028 — content is mild (materials quality, single dwelling) and won't affect day-to-day use. Not a real risk.
DDO13/DDO14 overlays mean future exterior renovations/extensions may need a planning permit. Verify with conveyancer what triggers the permit requirement.
DPO6 and Road Closure Overlay — confirm Road Closure Overlay doesn't affect access (Wembley Lane). Likely fine given frontage is on Northbridge Road.
Confirm sewer-main easement location won't restrict any planned future deck or extension.
SC3b wrong address certificates — conveyancer must verify this is clerical and doesn't affect the actual land boundary.
Auction: must have pre-approval and independent B&P inspection done before auction day — no conditions on day.

next_action: Inspect Saturday; verify study nook usability, courtyard coverage, room feel, summer heat control, and covenant/overlay implications with conveyancer.
